title: QwenPaw-Data: Bridging Facts, Methodology, and Execution for Autonomous Enterprise Data Analytics

official_repository.timing_relation: Latest origin/main commit with commit time not after immutable arXiv v2 update 2026-07-14T11:35:10Z; it is 2 hours 33 minutes before that update. The repository is cited by the paper as the general QwenPaw host, not explicitly as a release of the QwenPaw-Data application or its experiments.
official_repository.inspection: Complete case-insensitive text audit found zero occurrences of DataBridge, KramaBench, DAComp, Trace Graph, Metadata Graph, Knowledge Graph, artifact registry, reflection subagent, or task-specific checklist. The apparent QwenPaw-Data string occurs only as a Docker volume name. The archive contains a general-purpose QwenPaw runtime, 37 SKILL.md files, generic skill hub/workspace services, sandbox implementations, and six trace-named paths, but no identifiable paper evaluation assets or enterprise semantic/method flywheel implementation.

acquisition_head.relation: Post-v2 repository HEAD inspected through Git history only. It contains continued general QwenPaw development and does not repair the paper-to-release correspondence boundary established by the timing-appropriate archive.

verification.full_text_read: Layout-preserving extraction read from title through all eight sections, tables, figures, evaluation, future work, conclusion, and references; all 24 PDF page boundaries are represented.

claim_boundary: The archive supports limited inspection of the general QwenPaw host primitives. It does not release or reconstruct DataBridge, the described Skill-Hub hierarchy/evolution system, Host artifact registry/reflection lifecycle, industrial tasks, public-benchmark configurations, outputs, graders, traces, feedback, or longitudinal promotion records.
